---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---



```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

data_paa <- readRDS("data_paa.rds")

data_paa_arc <- data_paa %>% 
  select(architecture, PAA) %>% 
  mutate(architecture = as.factor(architecture)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(architecture), 
         !is.na(PAA)) %>% 
  mutate(architecture = reorder(architecture, 
                                -PAA, 
                                FUN = mean, 
                                na.rm = TRUE))
```

```{r}
paa_anova <- aov(PAA ~ architecture,
                 data = data_paa_arc)

summary(paa_anova)

paa_summary <- data_paa_arc %>%
  group_by(architecture) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(),
            mean_PAA = mean(PAA, 
                            na.rm = TRUE),
            sd_PAA = sd(PAA, 
                        na.rm = TRUE))

paa_summary
```

```{r}
ggplot(data_paa_arc,
       aes(x = architecture,
           y = PAA,
           fill = architecture)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.7,
               outlier.shape = 19,
               linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(x = "Model family / framework",
       y = "Performance Adjusted Average (PAA)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,
                                   hjust = 1,
                                   vjust = 1,
                                   size = 9),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12,
                                    margin = margin(t = 12)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12,
                                    margin = margin(r = 12)))
```
